wp-file-manager.title: Unauthenticated PHP File Upload via elFinder connector

revslider.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via Slider Revolution ZIP import

modern-events-calendar-lite.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via ICS import endpoint

drag-and-drop-multiple-file-upload-conta.title: Unauthenticated .phar Shell Upload via DnD CF7 file upload addon

contact-form-7.title: Unrestricted PHP File Upload via CF7 form attachment
contact-form-7.notes: Requires a CF7 form with a file upload field configured and PHP extensions not blocked. ~5M installs.

forminator.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via form submission
forminator.notes: Requires a Forminator form with file upload field. ~500K installs.

profilepress.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via user registration avatar

backup-migration.title: Unauthenticated RCE via PHP file inclusion through BMPath header
backup-migration.notes: Single POST with BMPath header. ~90K installs. INSTANT — no prerequisites.

wp-automatic.title: SQL Injection leading to unauthenticated arbitrary file write
wp-automatic.notes: SQL OUTFILE via csv.php. Must guess webroot path. Premium plugin.

ultimate-member.title: Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via registration meta injection
ultimate-member.notes: Multi-step: register admin account then upload. ~200K installs.

bit-file-manager.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Write via file manager interface
bit-file-manager.notes: Single POST to write endpoint. ~80K installs. INSTANT — no prerequisites.

wp-file-upload.title: Unauthenticated Path Traversal Arbitrary File Upload
wp-file-upload.notes: Needs nonce from a page containing the upload widget.

really-simple-ssl.title: Authentication Bypass leading to admin file upload
really-simple-ssl.notes: Requires 2FA feature enabled on the site. ~5M installs but 2FA rate is low.

ninja-forms.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via Ninja Forms file field
ninja-forms.notes: Requires a form with file upload field. ~800K installs.

wpforms-lite.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via WPForms file field
wpforms-lite.notes: Requires form with file upload field + field ID extracted from page. ~6M installs.

essential-addons-for-elementor-lite.title: Unauthenticated Password Reset Bypass leading to admin file upload
essential-addons-for-elementor-lite.notes: Multi-step: reset admin password then login + theme editor. ~1M installs.

themegrill-demo-importer.title: Unauthenticated Database Reset leading to default admin account creation
themegrill-demo-importer.notes: WARNING: DESTRUCTIVE — resets entire database. Avoid on production sites.

hunk-companion.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary Plugin Installation via REST API
hunk-companion.notes: Installs plugins from WP.org only — cannot install arbitrary PHP. Version detect only. ~20K installs.

startklar-elemenor-addons.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via Drag & Drop form handler
startklar-elemenor-addons.notes: INSTANT — single POST. Small install base ~20K.

simple-wp-events.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload via event import endpoint
simple-wp-events.notes: INSTANT — single POST. Tiny install base ~5K.

give.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection leading to Arbitrary File Write
give.notes: PHP object injection — POP chain not yet automated. Version detect only.

jupiterx-core.title: Unauthenticated Subscriber Registration + Arbitrary File Upload
jupiterx-core.notes: Multi-step: register subscriber then use role-bypass upload. ~100K installs.

litespeed-cache.title: Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via crawler hash brute-force
litespeed-cache.notes: Hash brute-force (0-999999) → admin session → theme editor. ~6M installs but slow exploit.

all-in-one-wp-migration.title: Subscriber+ SSRF via import URL
all-in-one-wp-migration.notes: SSRF — not a PHP file write path. Version detect only. ~5M installs.

elementor.title: Authenticated arbitrary plugin installation via CSRF
elementor.notes: CSRF + authenticated — not a direct PHP upload path. Version detect only. ~10M installs.
